0.content:
# Dynatrace MCP Server — Usage Governance
Governance view of activity driven through the Dynatrace MCP Server, derived from Grail query-execution events (`dt.system.events`, `event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT"`) whose `client.client_context` identifies the `dynatrace-mcp-server`. Use it to monitor **who** is querying, **how much Grail data** they scan (the primary cost driver), **which data types/buckets** are hit, and to spot **expensive queries** that breach policy. Adjust thresholds below to your organization's Grail budget. Use the time-frame picker to change the reporting window.

1.title: Total MCP Queries
1.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize `Total MCP Queries` = countDistinct(query_id)

2.title: Data Scanned (GB)
2.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes)
| fieldsAdd `Data Scanned (GB)` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields `Data Scanned (GB)`

3.title: Records Scanned
3.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize `Records Scanned` = sum(scanned_records)

4.title: Active Users
4.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize `Active Users` = countDistinct(user.email)

5.title: Queries > 1 GB (policy breaches)
5.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), by:{query_id}
| filter bytes > 1000000000
| summarize `Queries > 1 GB` = count()

6.title: Largest Single Query (GB)
6.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), by:{query_id}
| summarize m = max(bytes)
| fieldsAdd `Largest Query (GB)` = m / 1000000000.0
| fields `Largest Query (GB)`

7.title: MCP Queries Over Time
7.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize scanned_bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), by:{query_id, timestamp}
| makeTimeSeries queries = count()

8.title: Data Scanned Over Time (bytes)
8.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| makeTimeSeries `scanned bytes` = sum(scanned_bytes)

9.title: Data Scanned by Data Type (GB)
9.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(table) and table != ""
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), by:{table}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields table, `Scanned GB`
| sort `Scanned GB` desc

10.title: Queries by Data Type
10.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(table) and table != ""
| summarize Queries = countDistinct(query_id), by:{table}
| sort Queries desc

11.title: MCP Client Version
11.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize Queries = countDistinct(query_id), by:{client.client_context}
| sort Queries desc

12.content:
## Governance & cost control
Grail scan volume is the primary MCP cost driver. Track budget consumption, per-user quotas, and per-bucket cost below. Rows in **Expensive Queries** are candidates for review — narrow the timeframe, add filters, or use buckets to reduce scan cost. Pair this section with the anomaly detectors in `dt-alerts/` to be alerted automatically when policy is breached.

13.title: Grail Budget Used %
13.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes)
| fieldsAdd `Budget Used %` = bytes / 1000000000.0 / 500.0 * 100.0
| fields `Budget Used %`

14.title: Data Scanned by Bucket (GB)
14.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(bucket) and bucket != ""
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), Queries = countDistinct(query_id), by:{bucket}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| fields bucket, `Scanned GB`, Queries
| sort `Scanned GB` desc
| limit 25

15.title: Usage by User (quota tracking)
15.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize Queries = countDistinct(query_id), bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), Records = sum(scanned_records), by:{user.email}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| lookup [data record(email = "dan.pedrosa@dynatrace.com", name = "Dan Pedrosa", role = "Solutions Engineer", department = "Sales Engineering")], sourceField: user.email, lookupField: email
| fieldsAdd Name = lookup.name, Role = lookup.role, Department = lookup.department
| fields Name, Department, Role, user.email, Queries, `Scanned GB`, Records
| sort `Scanned GB` desc
| limit 50

16.title: Expensive Queries (> 1 GB scanned)
16.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| filter isNotNull(query_string)
| summarize bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), Records = sum(scanned_records), timestamp = takeFirst(timestamp), user = takeFirst(user.email), table = takeFirst(table), by:{query_id, query_string}
| fieldsAdd `Scanned GB` = bytes / 1000000000.0
| filter bytes > 1000000000
| fields timestamp, user, table, `Scanned GB`, Records, query_string
| sort `Scanned GB` desc
| limit 50
